fixtures._comment: tool-rendering-custom-catchall — first prompt 'weather in Tokyo'. Emits get_weather tool call. The custom wildcard renderer fires for any tool the user doesn't explicitly handle. hasToolResult:false on the tool-emitting fixtures.
tool-rendering-custom-catchall — follow-up after get_weather tool result.

response.content: Tokyo is 22°C and partly cloudy — the custom wildcard renderer should show the tool card above.

fixtures._comment: tool-rendering-custom-catchall — second prompt 'What's the current price of AAPL?'. Emits get_stock_price tool call to exercise a DIFFERENT tool through the same wildcard renderer.
tool-rendering-custom-catchall — follow-up after get_stock_price tool result.

response.content: AAPL is trading at $189.42, up 1.27% — rendered through the custom wildcard catchall renderer.
